UK forecast to see biggest hit to growth from Iran war out of major economiesThe OECD downgrades forecasts for many of the world's biggest economies due to the US-Israel war with Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgk0j71g417o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgk0j71g417o#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 12:56:33 GMT
'A game-changing moment for social media' - what next for big tech after landmark addiction verdict?The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c87wd0d84jqo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c87wd0d84jqo#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 09:37:57 GMT
Prepare for turbulence - how a prolonged Middle East conflict could reshape how we flyThe Gulf's hub airports made long-distance travel cheaper - but now their future looks unclear. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn08x9lw0pzo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn08x9lw0pzo#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 00:41:16 GMT

European Parliament gives conditional approval to EU-US trade dealThe agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c33l4e6vdrvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c33l4e6vdrvo#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 12:51:44 GMT
